skillEntry.name: string — Skill 名称（小写+连字符）
skillEntry.platform: hana | cursor | universal — 目标平台
skillEntry.path: string — 仓库内路径，如 skills/feishu-bitable-setup

quality.gated: boolean — 是否通过质量门控
quality.securityReviewed: boolean — 是否通过安全审查
